required_preferences.fact: Spends Thursday evenings assisting his mother-in-law with meals and personal care after dinner — card games are skipped for now, avoids solo TV as before

supersedes.fact: Plays cards with his wife and mother-in-law every Thursday after dinner — never watches TV alone in the evenings

required_preferences.fact: Delegates onboarding of new family members to experienced staff when the household is overloaded, focusing instead on urgent store and family duties.

supersedes.fact: Prefers to train new family members personally — never delegates onboarding to existing staff

required_preferences.fact: Shares extended weekend dinners with his sibling present, welcoming them to join neighbor gatherings for faster community integration
Brings a separate ledger for the bookkeeping job, keeping business finances completely compartmentalized — never mixes store and employer receipts in the same folder
Prepares negotiation scripts in English before supplier calls or emails to ensure clarity and avoid misunderstandings
Regularly consults with his sibling about job opportunities and local navigation, using evening hours for practical guidance and support

persona: An immigrant small business owner managing finances for a family-run grocery store
